title: Forthglade Natural Dog Dental Sticks (10 x 185g Bags), 50 Sticks - Plant-Based & Grain Free Dog Treats, Dental Chews for Fresh Breath, Removes Plaque and Tartar, Resealable Bags
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: FORTHGLADE DENTAL STICKS: 10 x 185g bags Dental Sticks; designed to help your four-legged friend maintain a healthy dental routine, *for dogs aged 1 year+
DEVELOPED BY VETS: These dog dental chews help to remove plaque and tartar, with added peppermint and eucalyptus to help freshen breath, and includes calcium to support strong teeth
NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Dental sticks dogs love, made with natural ingredients, bursting with goodness and packed full of flavour; free from junk and fillers
PLANT-BASED & GRAIN FREE: Our grain free and hypoallergenic dog treats are kind and gentle on your dog's tummy and easy to digest, box and bags are 100% recyclable
NATURAL PIONEERS SINCE 1971: Forthglade have over 50 years of making natural, nutritious dog and puppy treats with high-quality ingredients, no nasties and gentle cooking methods
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page Forthglade Natural Dog Food Dental Sticks 50 Pack Buying Options Fresh Breath Treats Buying Options Salmon Oil Buying Options Dry Dog Food Buying Options Meat Variety Pack Buying Options British Classics 12 Pack Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,144 4.5 out of 5 stars 549 4.5 out of 5 stars 237 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,441 4.2 out of 5 stars 9,616 4.3 out of 5 stars 81 Flavour — Chicken, Peppermint & Parsley Salmon Chicken Turkey, Duck & Lamb Chicken, Lamb & Beef Size 50 Sticks (10 x 185g) 4 x 90g 1 x 500ml 10kg, 6kg & 2kg Variety Pack (12 x 395g) Variety Pack 12x395g Grain Free ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Natural Ingredients ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Suitable For Puppy, Adult & Senior Dogs Puppy, Adult & Senior Dogs Puppy, Adult & Senior Dogs Puppy, Adult & Senior Dogs Adult Dogs Adult Dogs Type of Meal Dental Health Complementary Natural Supplement Complete Complete Complete
